description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions release workflow that runs daily and on manual dispatch. The workflow should have four jobs: build-linux, build-linux-arm64, build-windows, and build-darwin, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-18.04, ubuntu-18.04 with arm64, windows-latest, and macos-latest respectively), checking out the code, installing dependencies, building the project, and uploading artifacts. A fifth job, update-nightly-release, should wait for all previous jobs to complete, download the artifacts, create a zip file, generate release notes, and update the nightly GitHub release.
